title: ITALY enforcement action against Ministero dell’Economia e delle Finanze (12,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 12,000 on the Ministero dell’Economia e delle Finanze. The controller had been running an 'open competition, based on qualifications and examinations, for the recruitment of a total of (...)'.
